headline: 《痴迷》领跑今日热搜，新片蓄势待发
headlineEn: Obsession Tops Today's Trends, New Films on the Horizon
summary: 今日娱乐热点聚焦《痴迷》与《权力的游戏前传：龙族》，本周多部新片待映，暑期档竞争激烈。
summaryEn: Today's entertainment buzz centers on 'Obsession' and 'House of the Dragon', with multiple new releases this week heating up the summer box office.

industryHighlights.text: 今日无新片上映，本周将有2部新片亮相。
industryHighlights.en: No new releases today, with 2 films debuting this week.

industryHighlights.text: 《玩具总动员5》持续位列本周热搜前列。
industryHighlights.en: Toy Story 5 remains a top weekly trend.

industryHighlights.text: 《安昂传奇》等大片定档未来数月，备受期待。
industryHighlights.en: Upcoming blockbusters like 'Avatar: The Last Airbender' generate high anticipation.

industryHighlights.text: 暑期档竞争白热化，多部续集与原创作品同台竞技。
industryHighlights.en: Summer box office heats up with sequels and original films vying for attention.
